prefix_anonymized: pretty cool until you realize those historic sites lack proper preservation 😅
peer deeper than just old maps - even daily stuff back then has wild stories! ever think how our street food faves might've been ages ago? bet they got some tales too 🤟🏽
even regular streets have untold stories
throwing devices is a thing of the past, we prefer other forms of entertainment during celebrations
traffic congestion next day is a hassle
the food scene gets lively during events — heaps of tasty treats turning visitors into enthusiastic eaters
improvisational performances still don't always work

reaching a certain milestone? add 'find stability' posters all over
